introSection: Puppy Power is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently owned and travelled by UK showman John Parnham.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster debuted with showman James Bates at the Abbey Park fair in Leicester on 7 April 2017.

fullText:
Puppy Power is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently owned and travelled by UK showman John Parnham.

The coaster debuted with showman James Bates at the Abbey Park fair in Leicester on 7 April 2017.
